title: hydrangea opuloides var. stellata
intro: Hydrangea opuloides var. stellata, also known as the Star-leaved Bigleaf Hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia, characterized by its large, showy white flowers and distinctive star-shaped leaves. The roots and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hydrangea opuloides var. stellata include the treatment of kidney stones, gout, and rheumatism, as well as the promotion of urinary health and the relief of swelling. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the roots and flowers, and can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
